    G

    generateInvitationCode() - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Generates an invitation code

    Generates an invitation code.
    getAllQuestions(String) - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Gets all questions by a specific user.
    getAllReviews(String) - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Retrieves a list of all Review objects, optionally filtered by username.
    getAllUsers() - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Gets a list of all users in the database.
    getAnswerHasReview(int) - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Retrieves the status of the 'hasReview' flag for a specific answer.
    getAnswersByRole(String) - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Gets the list of answers for users with a certain role.

    Gets the list of answers for a user.
    getAnswersForQuestion(int) - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Gets the list of answers for a particular question.

    Gets askedBy

    Gets message content.
    getContent() - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper.PrivateMessage
    Gets the content
    getConversation(String, String) - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Gets all messages in a conversation between two users.
    getConversationList(String) - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Gets conversation list for user's inbox.

    Gets createdAfter

    Gets creation timestamp.
    getCreatedAt() - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper.PrivateMessage
    Gets createdAt

    Gets createdBefore

    Gets all feedback for a specific answer

    Gets a list of questions that have a parent question (follow up questions).

    Gets sender.
    getId() - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper.DirectMessage
    Gets message ID.
    getId() - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper.PrivateMessage
    Gets the message id

    Gets other user.

    Gets a list of all private messages for a question.

    Retrieves the ID of the question associated with a specific answer ID.

    Gets a question by its ID.
    getQuestionId() - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper.PrivateMessage
    Gets the questionId

    Gets a list of questions where parentQuestionId is NULL (Top Level).

    Retrieves a list of all ReviewReply objects associated with a given review ID.

    Retrieves a single Review object from the database by its answer ID.

    Gets a list of Reviewers by their role (all but two)

    Gets the answerId the review points to

    Retrieves a list of all Review objects associated with a given answer ID.

    Gets the sender
    getTo() - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper.PrivateMessage
    Gets the recipient

    Gets total unread message count for a user.

    Gets the number of unread answers for a particular question.

    Gets unread count.
    getUnreadPrivateCountForAsker(int, String) - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Gets the number of unread private messages for the asker.
    getUnresolvedQuestions() - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Gets a list of all unresolved questions in the database.

    Gets a User object from the Database

    Gets first user.
    getUser2() - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper.DirectMessage

    Gets user information by username.

    Gets the number of users currently in the database.
